login.title: Account
login.subtitle: Log in or register to access your services
login.error: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Register to access your services
register.twofa: I want two-factor authentication to connect (recommended)
register.newsletter: I agree to receive the newsletter and updates
register.success: Account created! Please check your email to verify your account.
register.passwordStrength: Password must be at least 8 characters with a number and a special character.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.success: Check your inbox — a reset link has been sent to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.sent: Check your inbox — a reset link has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.error: We couldn't find an account with that email.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
resetPassword.error: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

layout.alertsDescription: Create alerts to be informed about new properties that match your criteria.
layout.preEstimatesDescription: Your property pre-estimates are saved in your account and updated regularly.
layout.filesDescription: Save your property documents to show owners your seriousness as a tenant.
layout.favoritesDescription: Save properties you like in your favorites and compare them easily.
layout.recentDescription: Find your recently viewed properties with a single click.

emailVerification.title: Verify Your Email
emailVerification.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}.
emailVerification.success: Email verified! You're now signed in.
emailVerification.error: Verification failed. The link may have expired.
